title: Brain Stimulation for Mild Traumatic Brain Injury

skipped_criteria: History of mild traumatic brain injury on hospital admission: 'mild' severity grading and 'on hospital admission' timing cannot be expressed with available schema fields beyond the boolean presumed_tbi.
Subjective complaint of memory and executive function: no schema field exists for cognitive symptom complaints.
Must be able to sign the Informed Consent Form: consent capacity is not a schema field; also this trial explicitly requires informed consent, confirming requires_efic=false.
Under or over age limits: no specific age bounds are defined in the criteria text, so no rule can be encoded.
No specific complaint of memory and executive function: no schema field exists for cognitive symptom complaints.
History of major depression (Beck Inventory > 35): no schema field exists for psychiatric history or depression screening scores.
Drug addiction: no schema field exists for substance use history.
Uncontrolled epilepsy: no schema field exists for seizure disorder history.
Presence of any metallic prosthesis implant: no schema field exists for implanted hardware.
Presence of cochlear implant: no schema field exists for cochlear implant status.
Not able to sign the Informed Consent Form: consent capacity is not a schema field.
